name: chr15_subtelomeric_SD_q
description: Subtelomeric SD/LCR block at q-arm tip of chr15. Subtelomeric repeats shared across rat chromosome ends. Multi-copy at 95-99% sequence identity; assembly-uncertain in mRatBN7.2.

architecture.internal_structure: SD modules of 10-200 kb at 95-99% identity; shared duplicons across rat pericentromeric/subtelomeric regions.
